title: Byrdonis Nest
description:
You spot an enormous [jitter][red]Shambling Beast[/red][/jitter] chase off an injured [green][sine]Green Byrd[/sine][/green].

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned.

[sine]Your stomach gurgles...[/sine]
notes:
[gold]Eating the egg:[/gold] You crack the egg open and gobble it up. Good breakfast.

[gold]Taking the egg:[/gold] You gently scoop up the egg and stow it, thinking it may [green]hatch[/green] into something useful later.
